title: EU Truck Toll Calculator — Input
description: Configure your transport audit. Run per country for international trips.

country.title: Country
country.description: Country of the trip. Run separately per country for international routes.

lang.title: Report Language
lang.description: Language of the audit report output.

km.title: Kilometers driven
km.description: Total kilometers driven in this country (per country for international trips).

co2_class.title: CO2 Emission Class
co2_class.description: Euro emission class of the vehicle. CO2_1 = worst (Euro I), CO2_5 = best (Euro VI).

axles.title: Number of axles
axles.description: Total number of axles on the vehicle (truck + trailer).

weight_kg.title: Vehicle weight (kg)
weight_kg.description: Total laden weight in kilograms. Vehicles above 18,000 kg are classified as heavy.

fuel_liters.title: Fuel consumed (liters)
fuel_liters.description: Total diesel consumed during this trip in liters.

base_price_net.title: Net diesel price per liter (optional)
base_price_net.description: Optional: enter your actual net diesel price per liter. Leave empty to use live market price.

is_adr.title: ADR dangerous goods
is_adr.description: Enable if transporting dangerous goods (ADR). Adds surcharge for Austria.
